title: The Bracken Pack
description: A data pack that adds 11 fantasy dimensions to Minecraft!
body:
The Bracken Pack [1.19-1.21.10]
Adds 11 fantasy dimensions to Minecraft!

What started as a fun programming project to keep my mind busy during the pandemic took on a mind of it's own!

Play as one of twelve playable species and explore a multiverse of possibilities! From the ore-filled caves of the Underdark, to the anti-PVP dimension of Pax, each dimension caters to a different type of Minecraft player. 

This data pack adds 11 dimensions, more than 70 biomes, and more than 90 custom structures to Minecraft, as well as powerful weapons and ability books that provide a deal of utility to the game.

Players can travel between most dimensions by either building up to the max build height or digging down to near bedrock level. Although some dimensions can only be accessed through more difficult means.
